main.name: Joel Ortiz
main.bio: I am currently a full stack engineer focusing on backend development and kubernetes cluster management.
main.contactmessage: Here is where you should write your message to readers to have them get in contact with you.

resume.skillmessage: I work with kubernetes and Docker on a daily basis. This website is actually hosting on my cluster running on Linode. Taking on personal projects with GoLang to better understand it, as it's a very helpful language when it comes to the cloud.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Computer Science with a minor in Mathematics
education.description: University helped me understand the fundamentals of how computers work. Relevant classes to my current line of work would be Distributed Applications, Algorithms, and Object Oriented Design Patterns

work.title: Assosciate Full Stack Software Engineer
work.description: Helped migrate existing microservices out of VMs into Kubernetes clusters and setup new Jenkins pipeline. I am also assisting with new microservice development using SpringBoot java framework.

work.title: Software Engineer
work.description: At American Airlines I got a lot of DevOps experience, helping run kubernetes clusters, creating CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps, creating kubernetes manifest files, and developing microservices using SpringBoot java framework.
